name: Herman Riley
abstract: Herman Riley (August 31, 1933 – April 14, 2007) was a jazz saxophonist who was a studio musician in Los Angeles. He worked with Gene Ammons, Lorez Alexandria, Count Basie, Bobby Bryant, Donald Byrd, Benny Carter, Quincy Jones, Shelly Manne, Blue Mitchell, and Joe Williams.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Jazzmobile Salute to Dr. George Butler

about_quotes.speaker: John Heard
about_quotes.evidence: I have a band in LA called The Elders. ... Herman Riley who works with Jimmy Smith at the moment ... We have a great little band in LA.
about_quotes.doc_title: John Heard interviewed by Monk Rowe and Michael Woods, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995
